content.full_text:
343-1340
Telephone: 3342X-3252X

Post Office Box 786

918 Obispo Street

City of Guadalupe
1025 Guadalupe Street
GUADALUPE, CALIFORNIA 93434

January 28, 1977


Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Pursuant to your letter of December 22, 1976, with
reference to filing of Statements of Economic Interest,
will you please send me the proper forms that this
should be filed on.

Your letter neglected to say which form should be
used or where to obtain the forms.

Also, do members of the Planning Commission need to
file this annual statement?

Please let me hear from you.

Yours very truly,

Myrtle L. Chamberlain
Myrtle L. Chamberlain,
City Clerk

used or where to obtain the forms.

Also, do members of the Planning Commission need to
file this annual statement?

Please let me hear from you.

Yours very truly,

[illegible]
Myrtle L. Chamberlain,
City Clerk

721 dated 1/76-due when 4/1
well send 721
Planning Comm. 7/6 April
until Conflict of Interest Code
in effect
called 2-4-77 D.W

sections.question: Pursuant to your letter of December 22, 1976, with reference to filing of Statements of Economic Interest, will you please send me the proper forms that this should be filed on. Your letter neglected to say which form should be used or where to obtain the forms. Also, do members of the Planning Commission need to file this annual statement?
sections.question_synthetic: The City Clerk requests clarification on the proper forms for filing Statements of Economic Interest and asks whether Planning Commission members are required to file annual statements.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an incoming request letter from a city official to the FPPC, not an FPPC response. No conclusion or advice section present. The document references a prior FPPC letter dated December 22, 1976, but the response is not included in this document.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: Pursuant to your letter of December 22, 1976, with reference to filing of Statements of Economic Interest, will you please send me the proper forms that this should be filed on. Your letter neglected to say which form should be used or where to obtain the forms. Also, do members of the Planning Commission need to file this annual statement?
embedding.first_500_words: The letter is from the City of Guadalupe, addressed to the Fair Political Practices Commission in Sacramento, CA. The City Clerk, Myrtle L. Chamberlain, is requesting information about the proper forms for filing Statements of Economic Interest and whether members of the Planning Commission need to file this annual statement. Here is the full text of the letter: City of Guadalupe 1025 Guadalupe Street GUADALUPE, CALIFORNIA 93434 918 Obispo Street January 28, 1977 Fair Political Practices Commission P.O. Box 807 Sacramento, CA 95804 Pursuant to your letter of December 22, 1976, with reference to filing of Statements of Economic Interest, will you please send me the proper forms that this should be filed on. Your letter neglected to say which form should be used or where to obtain the forms. Also, do members of the Planning Commission need to file this annual statement? Please let me hear from you. Yours very truly, Myrtle L. Chamberlain Myrtle L. Chamberlain, City Clerk **City of Guadalupe GUADALUPE CALIFORNIA 93434** 918 Obispo Street January 28, 1977 Fair Political Practices Commission P.O. Box 807 Sacramento, CA 95804 Pursuant to your letter of December 22, 1976, with reference to filing of Statements of Economic Interest, will you please send me the proper forms that this should be filed on. Your letter neglected to say which form should be used or where to obtain the forms. Also, do members of the Planning Commission need to file this annual statement? Please let me hear from you. Yours very truly, Myrtle L. Chamberlain City Clerk
embedding.summary: This is an incoming request from the City of Guadalupe's City Clerk to the FPPC asking for proper forms for Statements of Economic Interest filings and clarification on whether Planning Commission members must file annual statements.
